propositions: The plan-review sidecar's coaching block persists only {move_id, finding_refs}, dropping move_name, subject, and the rendered coaching prose.
Dropping these fields prevents a downstream audit UI from reconstructing or re-rendering a coaching note, violating the epic's lossless-capture goal for pass-4.
The fix widens build_payload's coaching projection to persist the full record {move_id, move_name, subject, finding_refs, coaching} schema-tolerantly (missing fields yield None, never KeyError).
The change is purely additive to plan_review_result_v2 with no schema bump; existing readers ignore extra fields and older slim/v1 records stay readable.
The code-review sidecar already persists the full coaching array verbatim and needs only a regression test locking the lossless property.
Acceptance requires unit tests asserting all five coaching fields survive in both plan- and code-review sidecar payloads, with lint, typecheck, and test passing.
